invariants.description: Every constitutional doctrine or operative governance rule referenced as binding must map to at least one machine-readable invariant or enforcement artifact.
Every machine-readable invariant must declare an enforcement mechanism and evidence path or evidence generation rule.
invariants.evidence_path_or_rule: This file; each invariants[] entry must include enforcement_mechanism and evidence_path_or_rule

invariants.description: MASTER_PROJECT_INVENTORY.json must reflect all canonical governance artifacts required by the C-RSP governance chain.
MASTER_PROJECT_INVENTORY.md must be synchronized with MASTER_PROJECT_INVENTORY.json after remediation (same meta.generated_at_utc token).
invariants.evidence_path_or_rule: META generated_at_utc string appears in both JSON meta and MD header

invariants.description: Agent definitions must declare explicit allowed actions, forbidden actions, and required output constraints in machine-readable form where agent specifications exist.
Enforcement under 03-enforcement must include at least one executable verification path that can fail on governance drift.
invariants.evidence_path_or_rule: 03-enforcement/enforcement-map.json lists executable hooks; scripts return non-zero on failure

invariants.description: Evidence records must distinguish verified, unverified, and missing states; absence of evidence must never be represented as success.
Truth-status or implementation-status claims for governance components must be backed by concrete evidence references or verification output.
invariants.enforcement_mechanism: Human + verification/MATRIX.md; ledger records link to artifacts

invariants.description: Governance artifact naming must be canonical and non-duplicative across constitution, enforcement, and inventory layers.
invariants.enforcement_mechanism: scripts/verify_governance_chain.py (single canonical path per artifact class in inventory)

invariants.description: Repository topology checks must include governance-critical paths, not just structural existence under projects/.
All evidence ledger JSON records must pass JSON Schema validation against verification/evidence-ledger.schema.json at verification runtime.
Every governance verification run must emit a commit-bound artifact under verification/runs/ populated with real git HEAD and run outcomes.
CI and local verification must invoke the same topology and governance commands with identical flags (no skipped governance checks in CI).
invariants.enforcement_mechanism: .github/workflows/verify.yml; parity enforced by workflow inspection + verify_governance_chain.py
invariants.evidence_path_or_rule: .github/workflows/verify.yml steps; documented command block in MASTER_PROJECT_INVENTORY.md

invariants.description: Doctrine to invariant to enforcement to evidence to inventory chain must be referentially complete with no dangling nodes.
Remote GitHub Actions execution evidence must exist for governance verification (not workflow file inspection alone).
invariants.evidence_path_or_rule: verification/ci-remote-evidence/record.json updated after each provenance run; gh run view

invariants.description: Remote workflow conclusion must be success for governance CI correctness to be claimed.
invariants.enforcement_mechanism: Human + ci-remote-evidence record; gh run view conclusion

invariants.description: Artifact upload step must succeed remotely for cloud governance run artifact behavior to be claimed.
invariants.enforcement_mechanism: GitHub Actions upload-artifact step logs; gh run view

invariants.description: Uploaded remote governance artifact must correspond to the executed commit SHA and contain a non-empty commit_hash matching validated HEAD.
invariants.evidence_path_or_rule: governance run JSON commit_hash; record.json artifact_commit_hash

invariants.description: Remote workflow must not weaken or omit the canonical governance verification commands.
Verification and truth reporting must distinguish remote-verified facts from local-only facts and not-claimed items.
invariants.enforcement_mechanism: Human V&T discipline; ci-remote-evidence record schema

invariants.description: Every CI run must produce a governance artifact whose commit_hash matches GITHUB_SHA and is downloadable via artifact upload; inventory ci_provenance must track verify.yml hash and align with remote record when verified.
invariants.enforcement_mechanism: scripts/verify_governance_chain.py; .github/workflows/verify.yml upload + download self-verify; MASTER_PROJECT_INVENTORY.json ci_provenance
